title: Jamalapuram Temple
tagline: Jamalapuram Temple — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: Sri Venkateshwara Swamy Temple is located in Jamalapuram, near to Errupalem in Khammam district of Telangana, India.
overview.description: Sri Venkateshwara Swamy Temple is located in Jamalapuram, near to Errupalem in Khammam district of Telangana, India. The presiding deity in this temple is Lord Balaji and is said to be a swayambhu Lord, who self-manifested in this place. The legend has it that in ancient days Jabali Maharshi worshipped and did penance here at a place called Suchi Gutta and was said to have been blessed by Lord Venkateshwara. The temple here seems to have been in existence since considerable antiquity.

topPlaces.name: Jamalapuram
topPlaces.description: Jamalapuram is a small village located near Errupalem, a town in the Khammam district of Telangana, India. The village has a population of more than 3000 people.

topPlaces.name: Remidicherla
topPlaces.description: Remidicherla is a small village in Yerrupalem Mandal of Khammam District. It is the second-most populated village in Yerrupalem Mandal.

topPlaces.name: Yerrupalem mandal
topPlaces.description: Yerrupalem mandal is one of the 21 mandals (administrative divisions) located in the Khammam district of Telangana, India. It falls under the jurisdiction of the Khammam revenue division, with its headquarters situated in the village of Yerrupalem.

topPlaces.name: Yerrupalem
topPlaces.description: Yerrupalem or Yerupalem or Errupalem is a village in Yerrupalem mandal of Khammam district, Telangana, India falling within the Madhira Assembly Constituency.

topPlaces.name: Morusumilli
topPlaces.description: Morusumilli also called Morusumalli is a village in Mylavaram mandal, NTR District in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It belongs to Andhra region.

items.note: Jamalapuram is a small village located near Errupalem, a town in the Khammam district of Telangana, India. The village has a population of more than 3000 people.
Remidicherla is a small village in Yerrupalem Mandal of Khammam District. It is the second-most populated village in Yerrupalem Mandal.

Yerrupalem mandal is one of the 21 mandals (administrative divisions) located in the Khammam district of Telangana, India. It falls under the jurisdiction of the Khammam revenue division, with its headquarters situated in the village of Yerrupalem.
Yerrupalem or Yerupalem or Errupalem is a village in Yerrupalem mandal of Khammam district, Telangana, India falling within the Madhira Assembly Constituency.
Morusumilli also called Morusumalli is a village in Mylavaram mandal, NTR District in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It belongs to Andhra region.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jamalapuram Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jamalapuram Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jamalapuram Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Vijayawada Airport (45 km) and the nearest railway station is Vijayawada Junction (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jamalapuram Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jamalapuram Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jamalapuram Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Jamalapuram Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jamalapuram Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jamalapuram, Remidicherla, Yerrupalem mandal, Yerrupalem, Morusumilli.
